meta.question: List APS Interfce Requirements and their Acceptence State.
meta.finalAnswer:
The following APS Interface Requirements were identified in the model:

1. STR to APS ICD
2. APS to SER ICD
3. SCMS to APS ICD
4. APS to OSS ICD
5. TCS to APS ICD
6. M1CS GLC to APS ICD
7. APS to CSW ICD
8. APS to DMS ICD

Note: A direct property representing "Acceptance State" could not be identified for these requirements in the current model structure.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Exploration Step 1 identified several elements related to APS. Now I need to map the properties of a representative requirement element to understand how to find 'Interface Requirements' and their 'Acceptance State'. I will pick one of the packages or blocks that seems to contain requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "APS Performance Requirements" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: I have identified the requirements. Now I need to find the 'Acceptance State' property. I will inspect the properties of one of the identified interface requirements (e.g., 'STR to APS ICD').

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "STR to APS ICD" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "STR to APS ICD" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("ICD")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop ?value WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Project%2520Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::TMT%2520Observatory%2520System::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::TMT%2520Requirements%2520imported%2520from%2520DOORS::DRD%2520APS::APS%2520Requirements::Interface%2520Requirements::STR%2520to%2520APS%2520ICD> ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?slot ?featureName ?valueName WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Project%2520Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::TMT%2520Observatory%2520System::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::TMT%2520Requirements%2520imported%2520from%2520DOORS::DRD%2520APS::APS%2520Requirements::Interface%2520Requirements::STR%2520to%2520APS%2520ICD> vocab:Element_appliedStereotypeInstance ?instance .
  ?instance vocab:InstanceSpecification_slot ?slot .
  ?slot vocab:Slot_definingFeature ?feature .
  ?feature vocab:NamedElement_name ?featureName .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?slot vocab:Slot_value ?val .
    ?val vocab:InstanceValue_instance ?valInst .
    ?valInst vocab:NamedElement_name ?valueName .
  }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name ?prop ?val WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("ICD")))
  ?elem ?prop ?val .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?prop)), LCASE("state")))
}
LIMIT 25
